generated_oml:
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework utilizing Building Information Modeling (BIM) for semantic data representation, with TwinLight and BOREALIS research projects providing foundational support. The framework automates DT artifact generation from enriched BIM models, includes standardized extension points for custom services, and facilitates real-time data synchronization through integrated protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables ArtifactGenerationService
]

instance TwinLight : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Research project providing foundational support for the Digital Twin framework"
]

instance BOREALIS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Research project providing foundational support for the Digital Twin framework"
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for policy-based validation (enforcing value ranges and units) and persistent event storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataValidationService, EventStorageService, ControlService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for at-least-once message delivery"
    DTDFVocab:enables MessageDeliveryService, RealTimeDataExchangeService
]

instance RevitBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Revit format BIM model for building geometry and semantics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance IFCBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "IFC format BIM model for building geometry and semantics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance StructuredDTArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured digital twin artifacts derived from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, EclipseHono
]

instance LightTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Visualization component that processes Revit-specific photometric values for UE5 scene rendering"
]

instance TwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Standardized extension point for integrating custom services and analytics"
]

instance FeatureParser : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Standardized extension point for custom service integration"
]

instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems controlled via Eclipse Ditto's DittoController with policy-based validation"
]

instance ArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates structured DT artifacts from enriched BIM models using Model-Driven Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuredDTArtifactsInsight
]

instance DataValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for policy-based validation of data values and units"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataValidationInsight
]

instance EventStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for persistent event storage of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EventStorageInsight
]

instance MessageDeliveryService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for at-least-once message delivery of real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides MessageDeliveryInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for bidirectional real-time data synchronization between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataExchangeInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for interactive visualization interfaces for monitoring and control operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive analytics supporting operational decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance CustomizableServicesService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for customizable service extensions via standardized plugin architecture"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomizableServicesInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for controlling physical actuators with pre-execution safety checks"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance StructuredDTArtifactsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from structured DT artifacts for building modeling and simulation"
]

instance DataValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming data validity within policy-defined ranges and units"
]

instance EventStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight regarding persistent storage of operational events"
]

instance MessageDeliveryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming reliable message delivery for real-time data"
]

instance RealTimeDataExchangeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of live synchronization between physical assets and digital twin"
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for interactive visualization of building infrastructure status"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from predictive analytics for operational decision-making"
]

instance CustomizableServicesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of customizable service extensions for evolving requirements"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to control lighting systems with policy-based safety validation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure system within AECO domain comprising Building Control System components"
    base:contains LightingSystemActuator
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration, where the DT Framework acts as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, coordinating roles across the DT life cycle, and addressing scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems, interoperability, maintainability, and accessibility requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The life cycle stages encompass initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to establish a unified semantic foundation. This is followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) processes that automatically transform enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts. Subsequent stages include real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital systems, interactive visualization for Facility Managers to monitor and control operations, and modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom analytics services, thereby supporting continuous evolution throughout the asset's operational life."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation enforcing value ranges and units for sensor data, and pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is ensured via Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, mitigating network failures. The model-driven transformation process ensures accurate synchronization between physical assets and the DT through structured data validation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Automated deployment process enabling reproducible DT setups with runtime configuration management for adjustments without full redeployment, supported by a modular architecture featuring standardized extension points for scalable, service-oriented development in AECO."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with BIM standards for enriched model data, bidirectional data exchange protocols for real-time synchronization, and standardized extension points enabling interoperability across heterogeneous systems including enterprise applications and IoT devices, addressing scalability and maintainability requirements."
]
